get.summary: Retrieves a list of parties based on their active status and a specified limit.
get.description:
This method queries the party service to retrieve the requested parties. If no
            parties match the criteria, a 404 Not Found response is returned with an appropriate message.

parameters.name: active
parameters.description:
A value indicating whether to retrieve only active parties. If true, only active parties
            are returned; otherwise, inactive parties are included.

parameters.name: number
parameters.description: The maximum number of parties to retrieve. The default value is 100.

get.summary: Retrieves a party by its unique identifier.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the party to retrieve.

get.summary: Retrieves party information based on the specified query parameters.
get.description:
At least one of the query parameters, name or acronym, should be provided to perform a meaningful search. If both parameters are null or empty,
            the method may return a 404 response.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The name of the party to search for. This parameter is optional.

parameters.name: acronym
parameters.description: The acronym of the party to search for. This parameter is optional.

get.summary: Retrieves a politician's details by their unique identifier.
get.description:
This method uses the Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc.HttpGetAttribute to handle HTTP GET requests. 
            Ensure the provided id corresponds to an existing politician in the system.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the politician to retrieve.

get.summary: Retrieves a politician's details by their name.
get.description:
This method queries the underlying data source for a politician matching the
            specified name. If no match is found, a 404 Not Found response is returned.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The name of the politician to search for. This parameter is case-insensitive.

get.summary: Retrieves a list of politicians based on the specified filter criteria.
get.description:
This method allows filtering politicians by various criteria, such as party
            affiliation, activity status,  work location, and gender. If no filter criteria are provided, the method
            returns up to the specified  number of politicians (default is 100).

parameters.name: partyAcronym
parameters.description: The acronym of the political party to filter by. Optional.

parameters.name: partyName
parameters.description: The name of the political party to filter by. Optional.

parameters.name: isActive
parameters.description:
Specifies whether to filter by active politicians. If true, only active politicians are
            returned; if false, only inactive politicians are returned. Optional.

parameters.name: location
parameters.description: The work location to filter politicians by. Optional.

parameters.name: gender
parameters.description: The gender to filter politicians by. Optional.

parameters.name: number
parameters.description: The maximum number of politicians to retrieve. Must be a positive integer. Defaults to 100.

get.summary:
Retrieves a list of voting rounds from the database based on the specified date range and maximum number of
entries.
get.description:
This method queries the database for voting rounds that match the specified criteria.
            If no criteria are provided, all available rounds up to the specified maximum are returned.

parameters.name: startDate
parameters.description:
The optional start date to filter the voting rounds. Only rounds occurring on or after this date will be
            included. If null, no lower date limit is applied.

parameters.name: endDate
parameters.description:
The optional end date to filter the voting rounds. Only rounds occurring on or before this date will be
            included. If null, no upper date limit is applied.

parameters.name: maxNumberOfEntries
parameters.description: The maximum number of voting rounds to retrieve. Must be a positive integer. Defaults to 100.

get.summary: Retrieves the voting round associated with the specified vote number.
get.description:
This method queries the voting round service to retrieve the voting round associated
            with the given vote ID. If no voting round is found for the specified ID, a 404 Not Found response is
            returned.

parameters.name: voteNumber
parameters.description: The number of the vote for which the voting round is requested.

get.summary: Gets all the votes for a given ParliamentMonitor.Contracts.Model.Votes.Round.

parameters.name: number
parameters.description: MANDATORY - The integer that identifies the ParliamentMonitor.Contracts.Model.Votes.Round

parameters.name: partyId
parameters.description: The ParliamentMonitor.Contracts.Model.Party id to filter the votes by

parameters.name: partyAcronim
parameters.description: The acronym of a given ParliamentMonitor.Contracts.Model.Party to filter the votes by

get.summary: Retrieves all votes associated with a specific round by its unique identifier.
get.description:
This method queries the voting service to retrieve all votes for the specified round.
            Ensure that the roundId is a valid and existing round identifier.

parameters.name: roundId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the round for which votes are to be retrieved.
